event_schedule_json.description: Full three-day event timeline. JSON array of event objects with id, title, description, startTime, endTime, venueId, dayNumber, and optional ctaLabel/ctaDeepLink.

defaultValue.value: [{"id": "chiringuito-playa", "name": "Chiringuito Playa de los Lances", "latitude": 36.0058, "longitude": -5.6119, "walkingDirections": "Desde el centro, caminar 10 min por el paseo maritimo hacia el sur", "terrainNote": "arena"}, {"id": "mirador-estrecho", "name": "Mirador del Estrecho", "latitude": 36.0008, "longitude": -5.6108, "walkingDirections": "Desde el centro, subir por la Calle Sancho IV hasta el mirador", "terrainNote": "asfalto"}]

venues_json.description: List of wedding venues with GPS coordinates. JSON array of venue objects with id, name, latitude, longitude, and optional walkingDirections/terrainNote.

defaultValue.value: [{"id": "cocktail-menu", "title": "Carta de Cocteles", "contentType": "cocktailMenu", "unlockAt": "2026-05-30T19:30:00+02:00"}, {"id": "seating-chart", "title": "Plan de Mesas", "contentType": "seatingChart", "unlockAt": "2026-05-30T21:50:00+02:00"}, {"id": "banquet-menu", "title": "Menu del Banquete", "contentType": "banquetMenu", "unlockAt": "2026-05-30T22:00:00+02:00"}]

time_gates_json.description: Unlock timestamps for time-gated content. JSON array with id, title, contentType (cocktailMenu/seatingChart/banquetMenu), and unlockAt (ISO 8601).

seating_chart_json.description: Table and seat assignments per guest. JSON array of objects with guestUid, tableName, and seatNumber. Empty until populated closer to the event.

quick_contacts_json.description: Emergency and coordinator contacts. JSON array of objects with id, label, phoneNumber (international format without +), and type (phone/whatsapp).

defaultValue.value: {"levante": ["Hoy sopla levante... agarra bien el sombrero!", "Levante en Tarifa: el peinado es solo una sugerencia"], "poniente": ["Poniente suave, buen dia para la playa", "Con poniente asi, hasta las gaviotas estan relajadas"], "other": ["Sin viento en Tarifa... seguro que estamos en Tarifa?", "Dia tranquilo, aprovechad para las fotos!"]}

wind_tips_json.description: Fun tip strings for the weather widget, keyed by wind type. JSON object with keys levante, poniente, and other, each mapping to an array of Spanish tip strings.

development_trigger_time.description: Deadline for automatic film development in the Unfiltered Camera feature. ISO 8601 timestamp in Europe/Madrid timezone.
